titleStmt.title: SII 26.525: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 525. (A.R. No. 497 of 1909.) ŚŌḺAPURAM, SIVAGANGA TALUK, RAMANATHAPURAM DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription records an order of the king containing the re-grant of some villages at the instance of a certain Viratamuḍitta Perumāḷ, and on the request of the sabhai of Uttamaśōḻach-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, a dēvādana of the temple of Uttamaśōḻaviṉṉagar-Āḷvār of Śōḻapuram. The re-grant was made to the same temple. The villages regranted were Vellaiyaṟainallūr alias Daṉmaparāyaṇappērēri, Tiruchchēlūr in Tuḍaiyanūrmuṭṭam, Amaṇaputtūr, Koṇḍayaṉēri and Upaṉiyaṉmaṅgalam. It is stated that the sabhai brought to the notice of the king the fact that these villages were granted to them during the term of his elder grandfather and later they were grouped into one under the name of Sundarapāṉḍyach-chaturvēḍimaṅgalam after the king's younger grandfather during the latter's time and that they subsequently became fallow due to drought and taxation difficulties, with the result that the worship (in the temple) was suspended. It is further stated that the sabhai requested the king Uttamaśōḻapperiyār, the grandson, to rename the group of villages as Uttamasōḻach-chaturvēdimaṅgalam and give it to 20 persons and make them reclaim the villages and use the products for worship in the temple of Uttamaśōḻaviṉṉagarāḻvār. It is stated that the king consented accordingly.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ koṉerimelkoṇ
ṭāṉ coḻapurattu Uttamacoḻaviṇṇakarāḻvār tevatāṉam Uttamacoḻaccaturvedimaṅkalattu sabhaiyār
kku Ivvāḻvār tevatāṉam Āṇmānāṭṭu veḷḷaiyaṟainallūrāṉa taṉmaparāyaṇappereriyum tuṭaiyaṉūrmuṭṭat
tu tiruccelūrum Amaṇaputtūrum koṇṭayaṉeriyum Upaṉiyaṉmaṅkalamum periya Appāṭṭar kālame taṅ
kaḷukku kāṇivārttu Iṟai kaṭṭiṉapaṭikku puravariyār Uḷvariyum Iḷaiya Appāṭṭar tirumukamum peṟṟu cuntarapāṇṭiya
ccaturvetimaṅkalameṉṟu Aṉupaviccu pontu piṉpu durbhikṣamum karabādhaiyumikku tāṅkaḷ kuṭipoṉamayil Ikku
ḷaṅkaḷ pāḻāy kāṭeḻuntu kiṭantu tiruvārātaṉamum muṭṭikkiṭantamaiyil peraṉār Uttamacoḻappe
riyārkku viṇṇappañceytu Ivvāḻvārkku Uttamacoḻaviṇṇakarāḻvāreṉṟu perālum Uttamaco
ḻaccaturvetimaṅkalameṉṟu Irupatu perkku nikāmañ ceyvittum kuḷaṅkaḷum kalluvittu nilamum kāṭuve
ṭṭik kaikkoṇṭu Aṉupavittu Untutāka Ippaṭikku nammolaiyum peṟaveṇumeṉṟu viratamuṭitta perumāḷ collukaiyi
l Appaṭi cevutāka coṉṉom Ikkuḷaṅkaḷ muṉpu tāṅkaḷ Aṉupavittu varukiṟapaṭiye Ivvāḻvārku paṇṭāṭu paḻanaṭai kaṭamai
Iṟuttu Aṉupavikka Ivai muṉivatarayaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai vayaṉāṭṭāyaṉeḻuttu Ivai pallavarayaṉeḻuttu yāṇṭu
patiṉ muṉṟāvatu nāḷ Āyirattoru nūṟṟu Orupattoṉpatiṉāl pracātañ ceytaruḷittu svastyastu .
Digital edition of SII 26.525 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
